notes: threads: ASDSL and llama both use 12
decode: greedy, temperature=0, ignore-eos on both stacks
metric: ASDSL decode_2_N (tokens 2-N) vs llama cli footer (all tokens)
weight_caveat: C0 uses HF asymmetric preq; llama uses Q4_K_M GGUF — speed comparison is canonical stacks, not identical bytes. Use --weight-parity for same tensors.
